title: Persist historical persona roster in session JSON

log.context: Persist historical persona roster in session JSON

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py` — `_handle_congress_start` method (line ~545)**

Added a roster-building block before the session dict is constructed. It iterates `agents/active/` (status=`'active'`) and `agents/fired/` (status=`'severance'`), reads frontmatter from each `.md` file, and builds a `roster` array of objects with: `id`, `name`, `display_name`, `title`, `avatar_url`, `status`, `emoji`, `color`, `description`, `role`.
